data.title: SBF turns myth buster, shuts down Epstein-style allegations in latest FTX defense
data.description:
In his latest attempt to defend his reputation to the outside world from behind bars, Sam Bankman-Fried (SBF), the former CEO of FTX Trading Ltd, came out today, February 20, to challenge the narratives that led to his conviction on seven counts of fraud and conspiracy. The former FTX CEO, currently serving a 25-year sentence […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sbf-myth-shuts-down-epstein-allegations/

data.title: These 10 Altcoins Led the Market This Week
data.description:
Altcoins quietly stole the spotlight this week, with several mid-cap tokens posting double-digit gains while Bitcoin traded sideways near the $67,000 range. According to CoinMarketCap’s weekly ranking of the top 200 cryptocurrencies, momentum rotated aggressively into select projects, signaling renewed risk appetite across parts of the market.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/these-10-altcoins-led-the-market-this-week/

data.title: Saba Capital and Cox Capital Plan Tender Offer for Private-Credit Funds
data.description: Boaz Weinstein’s investment firm, Saba Capital, along with Cox Capital, is gearing up to make a tender offer for stakes in three semiliquid private-credit funds. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X that this move is part of a broader strategy to capitalize on opportunities within the private-credit market. The funds in question are known for their unique structure, offering investors a blend of liquidity and access to private credit investments. This initiative reflects a growing interest in private-credit funds, which have become increasingly popular among investors seeking higher yields and diversification. The tender offer is expected to attract significant attention from stakeholders looking to optimize their investment portfolios in the current economic climate. Details regarding the specific funds involved and the terms of the offer are yet to be disclosed.

data.title: Sui’s DeepBook Margin Launch Marks Next Phase for DeFi
data.description:
Sui Network is pushing decentralized finance (DeFi) beyond spot trading with the launch of DeepBook Margin. A new layer built on the protocol’s existing DeepBook infrastructure that brings fully on-chain margin trading to its ecosystem. This upgrade expands liquidity mechanics from static pools into a more dynamic and capital-efficient financial layer
source: https://techgaged.com/suis-deepbook-margin-launch-marks-next-phase-for-defi/

data.title: Tokenized real estate projects advance in Dubai and Maldives
data.description:
A Trump-tied hotel development in the Maldives and the Dubai Land Department announced details on tokenizing their real estate projects this week.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/tokenized-real-estate-advance-dubai-maldives?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Nakamoto Inc. Completes $107 Million Acquisition of BTC Inc. and UTXO Management
data.description: Nakamoto Inc. has finalized a $107 million all-stock acquisition of BTC Inc. and UTXO Management, consolidating its Bitcoin media, capital, and advisory businesses under one publicly traded entity. According to NS3.AI, the transaction was announced after market close on Friday, marking a significant merger within the Bitcoin ecosystem. This strategic move positions Nakamoto Inc. as a comprehensive platform for Bitcoin-related media and advisory services.

data.description:
Developer activity across AI-crypto infrastructure projects highlights growing consolidation around compute, data and inference layers.

data.title: Mavis Tire Express Services Selects Banks for U.S. IPO
data.description: Mavis Tire Express Services, a prominent auto repair and tire service company, has chosen banks to manage its upcoming U.S. initial public offering (IPO), according to sources. Bloomberg posted on X, revealing that the company, which includes brands such as Midas and Tuffy, is preparing for its market debut. The decision to proceed with an IPO comes as Mavis aims to expand its presence in the automotive service industry. The company has not disclosed further details regarding the timeline or the financial specifics of the IPO. Mavis Tire Express Services is known for its comprehensive range of services, including tire sales, repairs, and maintenance, catering to a broad customer base across the United States. The move to go public is expected to enhance its market position and provide additional capital for growth initiatives.

data.title: Fed Bank of St. Louis President Maintains Economic Outlook Amid Tariff Changes
data.description: The President of the Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis has stated that his economic outlook remains largely unchanged despite recent developments regarding tariffs. Bloomberg posted on X that the Supreme Court's decision to strike down certain levies has not significantly altered the economic forecast. The official expressed confidence that the Trump administration could sustain most of its tariffs through alternative methods, ensuring stability in economic projections. This perspective comes amid ongoing discussions about the impact of trade policies on the U.S. economy.

data.title: Here Is How Much Wall Street Giants Have Invested in Bitmine’s Ethereum Strategy
data.description:
Key Takeaways Bitmine holds 4. 37 million ETH – 3. 62% of total supply – and targets 5%.
source: https://coindoo.com/here-is-how-much-wall-street-giants-have-invested-in-bitmines-ethereum-strategy/

data.title: BNP Paribas Launches Pilot to Tokenize Money Market Fund Shares on Ethereum
data.description: BNP Paribas has announced a pilot project aimed at tokenizing money market fund shares using the Ethereum blockchain. According to NS3.AI, the asset tokens will be issued through the AssetFoundry platform, which operates on a permissioned Ethereum model to ensure regulatory compliance. This initiative is designed to cater exclusively to eligible investors, promoting secure and regulated token transfers.

data.title: Anthropic's Claude Code Evolves into Billion-Dollar Enterprise
data.description:
Anthropic's Claude Code, initially a side project, has rapidly transformed into a billion-dollar business. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the company's significant growth and impact in the tech industry. The project, which began with modest ambitions, has now become a major player, attracting substantial investment and attention.

The success of Claude Code underscores the increasing demand for innovative technology solutions and the potential for rapid growth in the sector. As the company continues to expand, it is poised to further influence the market and drive technological advancements.

Anthropic's journey from a small-scale initiative to a billion-dollar enterprise exemplifies the dynamic nature of the tech industry and the opportunities available for groundbreaking projects. The company's achievements reflect a broader trend of innovation and investment in technology, signaling a promising future for similar ventures.

data.title: Cornerstone Building Brands Creditors Prepare for Talks with Private Equity Owner
data.description: A group of creditors of Cornerstone Building Brands is preparing to coordinate their efforts in anticipation of discussions with the company's private equity owner, Clayton Dubilier & Rice. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the creditors' intention to strengthen their negotiating position as the company's performance shows signs of weakening. The move comes as Cornerstone Building Brands faces challenges, prompting its creditors to seek a unified approach in upcoming negotiations. The creditors aim to leverage their collective influence to address concerns related to the company's financial health and strategic direction.

data.title: Argentina's Labor Reform Bill Faces Senate Vote Amid Worker Opposition
data.description: Argentina's House of Representatives passed a controversial labor reform bill early Friday, November 20, which has faced strong opposition from workers. According to Ming Pao, the bill will now be sent back to the Senate for a final vote. The far-right President Javier Milei, advocating for fiscal austerity and a market economy, has pushed for the bill, which includes provisions to reduce severance pay, increase working hours, and cut vacation time.

data.title: Prince Andrew Arrested on Misconduct Charges
data.description: Prince Andrew, the younger brother of King Charles III, was arrested on Thursday, his 66th birthday, on charges of misconduct in public office. According to Ming Pao, he was detained for 11 hours before being released later that evening. The police emphasized that the investigation is still ongoing. As Prince Andrew left the Aylsham police station in Norfolk, England, he was photographed sitting in the back seat of a car, drawing significant attention from international media. This event marks a historic moment as a former senior member of the royal family is treated like an ordinary suspect.

data.title: Amazon Surpasses Walmart in Annual Revenue, Becoming Top U.S. Company
data.description: Amazon has overtaken Walmart to become the highest revenue-generating company in the United States. According to Ming Pao, Amazon reported sales of $716.9 billion in its most recent full fiscal year, surpassing Walmart's sales of $713.2 billion for the fiscal year ending in January. This marks a significant milestone for Amazon as it continues to expand its market presence.

data.title: Hong Kong Property Sale Reflects Significant Appreciation Over Two Decades
data.description: A prominent investor has continued to offload assets, with recent data indicating a notable transaction. According to Ming Pao, the ground floor shop A at 1-11 Holland Street, Kennedy Town, owned by the son of Wing Lung Group founder, Lun Yiu-Kei, was sold for HKD 8.6 million in mid-month. The shop spans approximately 1,100 square feet, translating to a price of HKD 7,818 per square foot. The previous owner acquired the property in August 2004 for HKD 3.6 million, holding it for over 21 years. This sale reflects a paper profit of approximately HKD 5 million, marking a property appreciation of about 139%.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin is building a ‘cypherpunk principled non-ugly Ethereum’ as devs officially add FOCIL to upgrade roadmap
data.description:
FOCIL was officially “scheduled for inclusion” as the consensus-layer (CL) headliner for the upcoming Hegota upgrade, targeted for late 2026.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/390682/vitalik-buterin-is-building-a-cypherpunk-principled-non-ugly-ethereum-as-devs-officially-add-focil-to-upgrade-roadmap?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Bitcoin Sell Pressure Is Easing, But Whales Keep Dumping on Exchanges: CryptoQuant
data.description:
Bitcoin is down 46% from its October peak—and the largest holders keep depositing to exchanges, presumably to sell, says CryptoQuant.
source: https://decrypt.co/358782/bitcoin-sell-pressure-easing-whales-dumping-exchanges
